Collab Model 2 Lite

Purpose
- Public web showcase version
- Reduced feature set for lower reuse value

Included
- 1 idle motion
- 2 expressions: blush, heart_eyes
- moc3, display info, physics, 2 textures

Removed from lite
- showcase_scene.motion3.json
- outer_off.exp3.json
- disdain.exp3.json
- recording.exp3.json
- tears.exp3.json
- animal_ears_off.exp3.json
- vtube config

Recommended next step
- If stronger protection is needed, create lower-resolution web textures separately.
